ddls:
CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "experiment_name" TEXT /* Name of the experiment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the experiment */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the experiment */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the experiment */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the experiment (e.g., active, completed, archived) */,
  "experiment_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment type */,
  "principal_investigator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the principal investigator */,
  "funding_source" TEXT /* Source of funding for the experiment */,
  "ethical_approval" INTEGER /* Indicates if the experiment has received ethical approval */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the experiment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the experiment was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the experiment */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the experiment was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_principal_investigator_id FOREIGN KEY ("principal_investigator_id") REFERENCES user_accounts ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_experiment_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_type_id") REFERENCES experiment_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "participants" (
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each participant */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the participant */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the participant */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the participant */,
  "consent_status" INTEGER /* Indicates if consent has been obtained */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the participant */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the participant */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the participant */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Highest level of education completed by the participant */,
  "occupation" TEXT /* Occupation of the participant */,
  "medical_history" TEXT /* Any relevant medical history */,
  "consent_date" TEXT /* Date when consent was obtained */,
  "consent_form_path" TEXT /* Path to the digital consent form */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trials" (
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trial */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the experiment this trial belongs to */,
  "trial_number" INTEGER /* Trial number within the experiment */,
  "condition_value" REAL /* Condition value applied during the trial */,
  "stimulated_eye" INTEGER /* Indicates which eye was stimulated (-1 for left, 1 for right) */,
  "response_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the response recorded for this trial */,
  "trial_time" REAL /* Time taken for the response in seconds */,
  "trial_type" TEXT /* Type of trial (e.g., baseline, intervention) */,
  "randomization_group" TEXT /* Randomization group (if applicable) */,
  "repeated_measure" INTEGER /* Indicates if the trial is part of a repeated measure design */,
  "device_used" TEXT /* Device or equipment used for the trial */,
  "location" TEXT /* Physical location where the trial took place */,
  "trial_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the trial */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trial_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trials_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trials_response_id FOREIGN KEY ("response_id") REFERENCES responses ("response_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "responses" (
  "response_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each response */,
  "response_value" INTEGER /* Value representing the response (e.g., 0 for incorrect, 1 for correct) */,
  "response_time" REAL /* Time taken for the response in seconds */,
  "response_type" TEXT /* Type of response (e.g., visual, auditory) */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level of the participant's response */,
  "response_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the response */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("response_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "conditions" (
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each condition */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the related experiment */,
  "condition_description" TEXT /* Description of the condition applied */,
  "condition_order" INTEGER /* Order in which the condition was applied */,
  "condition_duration" REAL /* Duration of the condition */,
  "condition_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the condition */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("condition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_conditions_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_analysis" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis result */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the experiment related to the analysis */,
  "result_summary" TEXT /* Summary of the analytical results */,
  "analysis_date" TEXT /* Date when the analysis was performed */,
  "analysis_type" TEXT /* Type of analysis performed (e.g., descriptive, inferential) */,
  "analysis_method" TEXT /* Method used for the analysis */,
  "confidence_interval" REAL /* Confidence interval of the results */,
  "p_value" REAL /* P-value of the results */,
  "analysis_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the analysis */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_analysis_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_accounts" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for logging in */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for security */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, administrator) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  "account_status" TEXT /* Status of the account (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the experiment related to the action */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Description of the action taken */,
  "log_date" TEXT /* Date when the action was logged */,
  "log_type" TEXT /* Type of log entry (e.g., trial data, experiment status) */,
  "log_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the log entry */,
  "log_ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the action was performed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_logs_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES user_accounts ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each type of experiment */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the experiment type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the experiment type */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the experiment type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the experiment type was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the experiment type */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the experiment type was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_types_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES user_accounts ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_types_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES user_accounts ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_visualizations" (
  "visualization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each visualization */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the related experiment */,
  "visualization_type" TEXT /* Type of visualization (e.g., bar chart, pie chart) */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* Path to the visualization file */,
  "visualization_title" TEXT /* Title of the visualization */,
  "visualization_description" TEXT /* Description of the visualization */,
  "visualization_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the visualization */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("visualization_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_visualizations_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the participant providing feedback */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the experiment related to the feedback */,
  "feedback_text" TEXT /* Text of the feedback provided */,
  "submission_date" TEXT /* Date when the feedback was submitted */,
  "feedback_type" TEXT /* Type of feedback (e.g., positive, negative, neutral) */,
  "feedback_rating" INTEGER /* Numerical rating provided by the participant */,
  "feedback_status" TEXT /* Status of the feedback (e.g., reviewed, pending) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id")
)
